MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Snavely, Plantiff appeared in Propria Persona
Allison Pascal, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Michael Dumas

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff John Snavely's Motion To Compel Inspection Of The Dental Office Of Dr. Michael Dumas is granted with the provision that Plaintiff shall provide a professional photographer or videographer to accompany him for the inspection.
